title: Blue Netherite for Faithful 64x
description: This resource pack adds blue netherite which can be used with faithful 64x or even if you want high quality blue netherite. The textures are a remix from Faithful 64x by @HARYA301. THIS IS NOT FROM THE OFFICIAL FAITHFUL CREATORS BUT IS SAFE TO USE.
body: This resource pack adds **_blue netherite_** which can be used with _**faithful 64x**_ or even if you want high quality blue netherite. The textures are a remix from **_Faithful 64x_** by **_@HARYA301_**. THIS IS NOT FROM THE OFFICIAL FAITHFUL CREATORS BUT IS SAFE TO USE.
